487 P1AP P1AP_PEDIATRIC (P1AP) Pediatric Unit CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: special treatments, procedures, and programs - special care - treatments in last 14 days - pediatric unit. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
488 P1AQ P1AQ_RESPITE (P1AQ) Respite Care CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: special treatments, procedures, and programs - special care - treatments in last 14 days - respite care. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
